name: Demon Brothers
description: A duo of Mist Nin who work for Zabuza, the Demon Brothers specialize in assassinating their targets with their shuriken chain.

skills.name: Chain Wrap
skills.description: Demon Brothers wrap one enemy. The following 3 turns, if Demon Brothers uses a new harmful skill on that enemy, their non-mental skills will be stunned for 1 turn. During this time, Demon Brothers becomes invulnerable to ranged skills and this skill is replaced by 'Chain Shred'.

skills.name: Bladed Gauntlet
skills.description: Demon Brothers uses their gauntlets shredding, gaining 10 permanent destructible defense and dealing 30 damage to one enemy. This skill will deal an additional 5 damage to the enemy affected by 'Chain Wrap'.

skills.name: Puddle Illusion
skills.description: The Demon Brothers hide in water, gaining 20 points of destructible defense and 1 taijutsu chakra.

skills.name: Demon Brothers Vanish
skills.description: This skill makes Demon Brothers invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Chain Shred
skills.description: Demon Brothers rip apart one enemy affected by 'Chain Wrap', dealing 45 piercing damage to them.
